name: Blockchain Intelligence Group
description: Blockchain analytics and risk platform with BitRank API for AML wallet screening.

seo.title: Blockchain Intelligence Group — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Blockchain Intelligence Group: Blockchain analytics and risk platform with BitRank API for AML wallet screening.

when_to_use: Crypto wallet AML screening with BitRank API
VASP transaction monitoring for FinCEN Travel Rule
Illicit fund tracing for law enforcement investigations
Exchange onboarding risk scoring for new wallet addresses
NFT marketplace seller risk assessment before listing

pros: BitRank API delivers ready-to-use wallet risk scores
Focused blockchain analytics for AML compliance
Works with law enforcement and regulated firms
Wallet screening without heavy investigation suite
cons: Smaller chain coverage vs TRM and Chainalysis
Less public research and typologies library
Lower brand recognition with regulators globally
review.verdict: Solid BitRank wallet screening option when you want AML scoring without paying Chainalysis prices.
review.best_for: Crypto exchanges and fintechs needing programmatic AML wallet risk scoring at mid-market pricing
review.not_for: Large investigations teams needing broad chain coverage and forensic-grade attribution data

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
